titleStmt.title: SII 15.135: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 135. (B.K. No. 43 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall of Vīrabhadra temple.
This is dated Śaka 1100, Viḷambi, Phālguṇa-puṇṇami, Friday, eclipse, Saṁkrānti. This corresponds to 1179 A.D., February 23, when a lunar eclipse occurred. The Saṁkrānti was Mīna.

It records gift of income from sales made by the One Hundred representatives of Māḷeyagēri headed by Rudradēva, Kēśavayya and others, to the gods Abhinavaprasanna-Kēśavadēva and Śaṁkaradēva at Lokkiguṇḍi. The earlier portion gives the genealogical account of the Kalachuris and praises Aichiseṭṭi who was responsible for the installation of the deity of Kēśavadēva at Lokkiguṇḍi which was a renowned agrahāra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya negarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
nama(ḥ) stasya varāhāya līlayā caratē bhuvi khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ khaṇakhaṇā yatēṁ .
śrī gindīvarānandacaṁdrō bṛndārakastuta�prasannakēśavaṟpāyād pāyā brajaṁ . prasa
nnakēśavasyōvyātprasannōvinamannṛṇāṁ Āditya vaṇijāṁ guṇi gaṇapatayē
śrī tākhiḷalōkanabhinavaprasannakēśava vibhu māḷkaiciseṭṭi gabhimataphaḷama . baḷa sogayipudiḷā
ḷakanatkaṭisūtramenel jaganidhi maṇigaṇanidhi nirmmaḷa kōmaḷanidhi gaṁbhīratānidhi satataṁ . tadvāridhi parivṛta jaṁbūdvīpada madhyadalli nijakāṁ
caṁca nda sakaḷaviyadvaḷayābhōgamuṁṭu mērugirīṁdraṁ tadvāmya diśeyoḷamaḷinanadyavanīdharasarōjanavanapurakēdārōdyāna nikaraśōbhā
kuṁntaḷamahītaḷaṁ sogayisuguṁ . va . Ā kuntaḷadharācakramaṁ vikramadinākramisida bhuja baḷacakri bijjaladēvananvayāvatāramentane . dvijasute kanyā
diṁ bhujaṁgabhūṣaṇananōrvvaḷārādhise tattrivagatpati meccikaraṁ nijasvaropama nāgaḷa tōṟi baḷikkaṁ . varamaṁ bēḍene ninnoḷnerevude varameṁdoḍākeya sva
ranoṁde puṭṭidaṁ taddharāṁśamene kṛṣṇaneṁba tanayaṁ sanayaṁ . va . Āntu puṭṭi sakaḷa vidyagaḷoḍane . ka . naramāṁsāśananenisidanara
karaṇadoḷmaraṇamanā harasutaneydisi kāḷaṁjaradoḷtadrājyabharama niḷkuḷigoṇḍu . va . Antu navalakṣadahaḷāmahīvaḷeyamaṁ sādhyaṁmāḍi
śvara cihname tanage rājacihnamāge rājyaṁgeydanātananvaya prabhavā bhūpōttamānvayadoḷu . ka . nijavīravitaraṇade bhūbhujarūḷsale kannamaṁ
brajanadhipatiyādaṁ varavijayaśrīgaṁ vinūtakīrttiśrīgaṁ sajjana sēvyarppuṭṭi darujjīvitasakaḷarājyavidyarttanayarbbijjalarājalanaṁba
yaṁgaṁ puṭṭuvavōl . kṣitipogaḷe rājalakṣmāpatigammugi śaṁkavarmma nu kriṣṇaṁ sannuta yōgarājanaṁbarssutarādarnnālvaruṁ parākramā gaḷ . jō
sūnu mahābhāgaṁ nijakīrttipūritāśābhōgaṁ prāgavanīpati caritōdyōgaṁ permmāḍi bhūbhujaṁ pesarvettaṁ . va . tattanūjaṁ . ka . pusiyalu vīrabhōjyā vasuṁdha
rā yeṁba vākyemena dhareyaṁ sādhisidaṁ teṁkabdhiya baḍagasīme viṁdhyādriyanisi bijjala dēvaṁ . va . Ā bhujabhaḷa cakravarttiputra . ka . rāyamurāri bhuja
vitaraṇa vivēkanidhi gaḷachuriyāmnāyavihāyōvaḷayātrēyaṁ śrīsōvi dēva cakrādhīśaṁ . tadanujanamaḷinaguṇagaṇasadanaṁ satyōktinika
bhāsvadvadanaṁviḷāsavirjjitamadana sale śaṁkavarmmadēvaṁ negaḷdaṁ . śaraṇāgata pavivarmmaṁ paripāḷita sakaḷadharmmanutpāditabandhura pari
kaḷachuri tiḷakaṁ śaṁkavarmma cakrādhīśaṁ . va . Ā niśśaṁkamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta rōttara pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
re tatnāladoḷu . ka . viḷasatkuntaḷadhātrilalanege tāṁ kuntaḷapradēśamenalbeḷvo ladēśamesavudadaṟoḷu tta lokkiguṇḍigrāma . Adu
ḷa kaṇi vēdadāgaraṁ sakaḷadharmmadharmmaśrīgāspadavakhiḷasajjanāśrayōdātta tānidhi samastavastu Ā grāmada sāsirvvaru
maṁ pēḷvaḍe ni grateyiṁ dvijarūpamanugrā . kṣiti pogaḷe lokkiguṇḍiyoḷatipriya hiriyasēnabōvaṁ bhāsva
t puṇyōdaya kēśavanatarkkyaguṇanamaḷataraya ḍedaṁ . va . Āntu nirantara sthitisāramuṁ vastusāramuṁ prabhusāramuṁ
ragrāma cakravartti lokkiguṇḍiyoḷu . © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāya dhyāna dhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭāna japasamādhi śīla
guṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛtarviditavēdārtthavidyāpāragarsvadharmmaniyata sapta sōmasaṁsthāvabhri tāvagāhanapavitrīkritaśarīra catu
śāstrakuśaḷarēkavākyaracaḷitadhairyyarddhairyaparākramarāśritajanakaḷpavrikṣarahita pakṣakṣayakararkkaliyaṁga
parōpakārigaḷāhavadhuraṁdhararśśāpānugrahasamarttharkāryya bṛhaspatigaḷēkayka paṁḍitagrāmanāmōttamarvaiṣṇavagītimanōhara pu
paranārīdūrardduṣṭavidhvaṁsakarvviśiṣṭajanāśrayarkāmakrōdhalōbhamōhavivarjjita rdvātriṁśatsahasra samayārgghyardvijakuḷatiḷakarśśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁja
guṇaviśēśōnnatarappa śrīrāmadatti mahāgrahāra śrīmallokkiguṇḍiyoroḍeya pramukhavaśēśamahājanaṁgaḷuṁ śrī sāsirvvaruṁ
hiriya sēnabōvaṁ puṇyōdaya kēśavadēvayyaṁgaḷu dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadha rmmadiṁpratipāḷisuttamire . © varaguṇa keyiṁ caritra
parahitadiṁ paradharōḷitaṁ jagadoḷparadanenalpuradaraiciseṭṭiye negaḷdaṁ . va . Ātana jagatprasiddhaviśuddhānvayōdayamentene . ka . bhuvana
ya vaiśyavaṁśadoḷpermmevetta nāgarakuladoḷ vyavahāri janāgraṇiyudbhavisi samantaiciseṭṭi jasamantaḷedaṁ . Ātanasati jakkavvevinūte guṇā
hitārundhati vikhyāte nijabandhusamudaya nūtanakaḷpalateyenisi pettaḷpeṁpaṁ . dhareyoḷtatputraṁ bandhuragātraṁ sakaḷa puṇyapātraṁ lōkō
traṁ sale saṁkaraseṭṭi jasakke tāne tāymaneyādaṁ . dhātriyoḷātana sati sāvitri patibrate samagratā nūtana sāvitri mahīmahimācaḷa pa
le jasamanasadaḷaṁ pasarisidaḷ . tatsutanabhijanavatsaḷanutsāritadurgguṇavimatsara natuḷōdyatsaṁpadanāśritabharaṇōtsukamananaicisa
nuḍiyoḷtodaḷācāradoḷ ḍaṁbatākṛtiyoḷekkasakka jasadoḷtoḍareni lāvaṁgaḍa mānyaṁ moraṭadaiciseṭṭivōlanya
nunnati tannoḷvāridhiya gabhīravṛtti surakujada mahōdāraṁ nelasidavene vistārisidaṁ jasamanaiciseṭṭiyenisidaṁ . Aicana guṇamu
ye taṇguralu basantada siriyu lōbhamumogetaṁdamṛta marīciyanuṇbaḷavā rāmaṁ mōhisave . Ātaṁganujātaṁ raghuja
sahōdaraneṁbantātatayaśanurvvīnutacāturyya kanniseṭṭi nirmmaḷa caritaṁ . kannaṁge śuddhavaṁśōtpannaṁge parārtthakaraṇapariṇataguṇa saṁ
ḷitapratipannaṁge samānamoḷare mahīmaṇḍaḷadoḷ . piriyananujātariṁdeṁbara mātaṁ tirkke sakaḷaguṇa piriyanenuttaṁ pogaḷvarppiriya
daiciseṭṭiye dhanyaṁ . ratiyaṁ pārvvatiyanaruṁdhatiyaṁ bhāratiyaninitananukari paḷtatsati sōmavve viśiṣṭākṛtiyuṁnati bharttṛbhakti
. va . Antu sakaḷagōtramitrakaḷatrasamētavaiciseṭṭiyarssukhadinirddoṁdu divasaṁ dharmmapurāṇaśravaṇadoḷ śrīkēśavapratiṣṭāpuṇya
tyamumaṁtadananakaraṇasāmartthyamumaṁkēḷdu nijaviśuddhabuddhiyappudariṁ tatkṟiyōdyuktanāgi sakaḷadharmmakṣētramappa śrīmadgrā
vartti lokkiguṇḍiyoḷ . ka . māḷeyagiri śrīlīḷeyināntirdda ratna māḷeyacelvaṁ pāḷisidudallivanadikpāḷeyamaṁ taraḷamaṇiyana
vēṁ . va . Endu bagedandu . ka . pāṣāṇarucirakarmmaviśēṣavabhinavaprasanna kēśava bhavanaṁ dōṣāpahaveṁdeṁduvaśēṣajanaṁ negaḷe pogaḷvinaṁ
. vri . divijahaṭatti(tki)rīṭa maṇirōcivirājita pādapaṁkajaṁ bhuvanajanastutaṁ nikhiḷadānavabhodharavadriniṁdirādhavananaghaṁ sarōjanibhalōcananutsa
prasannakēśavanolaviṁda rakṣisuge savinayāṁbudhiyaiciseṭṭiya paramārtthavriśavantana parikisalu śrī-śēkarātmōdbhavaṁ pi�duṁ dāni
karṇnaniṁde hiriyaṁ śaucabratācārane vara sāvitriya naṁdanaṁ diṭadineṁdaṁdī dharācakradoḷe sthiralakṣmīnidhiyaiciseṭṭiyēṁ valaṁ dhanyaṁ perardhanyarē .
moraṭavaiciseṭṭeyarmmāḍisida śrimadabhinavaprasannakēśavadēvargge . śakavarṣada 1101 neya viḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada phālgunada puṇnami śukravāra
grahaṇa saṁkrānti vyatipātadandu śrīmāḷeyagēriyanāyaka rudradēva pramukha vaśēśanūrvvaru tammakēriya sthānapūjeyaṁ nandādīvige naḍavantā
daya kēsavadēvayyaṁgaḷu mukhyavāgi binnageyadaśēśa mahānakharaṁgaḷu kammaṭadalu bhaṁgāravaṁ māṟanikidalli dēvaraṁgabhōgakke yācaṁdrārkkaBetween this line and the above, some
naḍavaṁtāgi nūṟakke bīsamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ caitrārōpaṇakke varṣaṁ prati bīsakke hāgavoṁdaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ caitrakke hāgavoṁdaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ bhaṇḍasāleya śrē
gaḷu yalu varṣaṁprati caitrakke hāga mattaṁ paitrakke hāgamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ gaṁdhavaṇadaṁgaḍiya nakharaṁgaḷu tammaṁgaḍiyalu varṣaṁprati caitrakke
hāgamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ bhattavaṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya nakharaṁgaḷu tammaṁgaḍiyalu varṣaṁprati caitrakke hāga . mattaṁ paitrakke hāgamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ nela
nakharaṁgaḷu tammaṁgaḍiyalu varṣaṁprati caitrakke hāga . mattaṁ paitrakke hāgamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ taḷabhōgada kēṇikāraṁ ghaḷigeyara kēśavadēva tannakēṇiya
dayeleyalli dēvarige biṭṭa Ele 200 . Āvaṁ varṣaṁ prati naḍeva kēṇikāṟaru pratipāḷisuvar . mattaṁ taḷāṟa malleyanāyakaṁ
keyalli dēvaraṁgabhōgakkācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ naḍevantāgi biṭṭa paṇa 5 maṁ varṣaṁprati naḍava taḷāṟaru pratipāḷisuvaru . mattaṁ vubhayanānādēsigaḷu dē
kke yūroḷage hokka peḷiyalli biṭṭa paṇa 2 heṟavara peḷiyalli biṭṭa paṇa 2 mattaṁ kudurege vīsavoṁdaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ haṁcukada bhāyiseṭṭiya
yaṁ māṟakoṁḍallihoṁge kāyeraḍu biṭṭar . Adanārōrvvarū māṟa koṁḍavaru pratipāḷisuvaru . mattaṁ pēṁṭheya kēriyaynūrvva
dānakkaṁ goṁdu baḷḷa bhattamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ śrīmāḷeyagēriya nāyaka rudradēvaṁ dēvara Aṁgabhōgakkācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ naḍavantā
1 . mattaṁ harika rāyarasaru biṭṭa gadyā 2 . mattaṁ mūrutiyara E biṭṭagadyā 1 . mattaṁ yavara cikka bammadēva biṭṭa gadyā 1 mattakokkaya
dēva biṭṭagadyāṇa 1 . mattaṁ śrīmadaccina kēṇikāṟaṁ bhāgyō daya kēśavadēvayyaṁgaḷu caṁdrārkkatāraṁ naḍavantāgi yuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiya
kēśavadēva biṭṭa paṇa 2 paga . © mattaṁ taḷabhōgada kēṇikāṟaṁ ghaḷigeyara kēśavadēva biṭṭa pa 2 pa .
© mattaṁ śrī saṁkaradēvarige karavaḍada kēṇikāṟaṁ cikka kēśavadēva biṭṭa paṇa 2 paga . mattaṁ taḷa
paṇa 2 paga . Intīdharmmamaṁ varṣaṁprati naḍava kēṇikāṟaru taṁtamma dharmmavāgi pra
moraṭadaiciseṭṭiyaru śrī śaṁkaradēvarige yuttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti
rigaṁ biṭṭa gadyāṇa 1 . Intī dharmavaṁ varṣaṁ prati naḍeva Āṇikāṟaruṁ taṁ
damagedA few letters in this line Sōmēs11vara IV, No, 63 above.
Digital edition of SII 15.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
